ground_truth.title: Facial Skin Care & Treatments Milwaukee - East Town Spa
ground_truth.main_content:
Facial Treatments in Milwaukee. 30 Minute Facial - $60.00 - BOOK NOW. 60 Minute Facial - $85.00 - BOOK NOW. 90 Minute Facial - $120.00 - BOOK NOW. 60 & 90 minute facials include a customized 5 min Illuminate LED therapy treatment.

AVEDA Tulasara Facial - Facial with cleansing, gently dry brushing, facial massage with oleation oil, a mask and tulasara concentration to help your skin to be firm, bright or calming. Tulasara means moving toward balance. Facial dry brushing promotes skin renewal and exfoliation, helping to eliminate toxins and other impurities to help restore radiant, glowing skin. Your service provider will analyze your skin and determine which type of tulasara facial will best serve your skin's needs.

Choices of Tulasara facials include: botanical skin resurfacing, dry/aging/uneven skin tone, dry, oily, sensitive.

Tulasara Back Facial - Designed to bring purity and balance to the skin on the back, this treatment will focus on cleansing, skin exfoliation and massage therapy. Perfect if you are having skin challenges on your back, seasonal skin changes or a special occasion. Your service provider will analyze your skin and determine which type of tulasara back facial will best serve your skin's needs. - $85 (60min) - BOOK NOW.

Choices of tulasara back facials include: botanical skin resurfacing, dry/aging/uneven skin tone, dry, oily, sensitive.

Vajacial with lavender - The ultimate facial that focuses on the bikini line and outer labia. The process removes dead skin cells, treats the ingrown hairs, helps prevention of acne and ingrown hairs. Includes cleanse, steam, exfoliating treatment and masque finished with lavender oil treatment. SAVE $20 when booked with a brazilian wax. Please note if you would like the brazilian wax choose brazillian w/ vajacial option found under waxing services. - $50 (25min) - BOOK NOW.

Day of Facial add-ons: Peels - $35, Brow wax - $20, Brow and lip wax - $31, Dermaplaning - $45, Hydrojelly masks - From $20, Microdermabrasion - $125 (ask about packages!!).

Related treatments: Pharmaceutical Grade Chemical Peel options, Mirconeedling Treatment with SkinPen options, Diamond Glow Facial options, HydroPeptide Facial Peel options, Microdermabrasion Treatment options, Dermaplaning Treatment options.
